authors: Al-Kaisy A, Van Buyten JP, Carganillo R, Caraway D, Gliner B, Subbaroyan J, Panwar C, Rotte A, Amirdelfan K, Kapural L
title: 10 kHz SCS therapy for chronic pain, effects on opioid usage: Post hoc analysis of data from two prospective studies
study_question: Does 10 kHz SCS reduce opioid use and pain after 12 months in chronic back and leg pain?
population_assessed: Adults with chronic low back and/or leg pain receiving 10 kHz SCS
outcome_measures: Opioid dose MME/day, back pain VAS, leg pain VAS
inclusion_criteria: Adults, chronic back and/or leg pain, SCS candidates, baseline pain thresholds met
answer_to_study_question: 10 kHz SCS reduced opioid doses and significantly improved back and leg pain at 12 months
